Sun May 24 14:39:37 SAST 2026
There was an unexpected error (type=Internal Server Error, status=500).
Command execution failed on MongoDB server with error 13 (Unauthorized): 'Command aggregate requires authentication' on server localhost:27017. The full response is {"ok": 0.0, "errmsg": "Command aggregate requires authentication", "code": 13, "codeName": "Unauthorized"}
org.springframework.data.mongodb.UncategorizedMongoDbException: Command execution failed on MongoDB server with error 13 (Unauthorized): 'Command aggregate requires authentication' on server localhost:27017. The full response is {"ok": 0.0, "errmsg": "Command aggregate requires authentication", "code": 13, "codeName": "Unauthorized"} at
